experiments.title: Cart URL recovery
experiments.notes: Strong manifest/cart 404 evidence. Recovery redirect shipped; add-to-cart rate recovered on juice PDPs.

experiments.title: Ginger + turmeric juice bundle
experiments.notes: Bundle visible but traffic too low in 14-day window; extending test.

experiments.title: Review widget above locator on PDPs
experiments.notes: Hypothesis plausible but evidence was homepage-level review mention, not PDP placement proof.

experiments.title: Locator-first module on juice PDPs
experiments.notes: Queued for Q3; merchant prioritizing cart fix first.

experiments.title: Fix homepage hero message match
experiments.notes: Not shipped — brand team rejected copy change.
